brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is relativistic quantum-field scattering: on-shell collisions among the quanta of Lorentz-contracted bubble walls producing heavy particles during a cosmological phase transition. Paper B's machinery is a statistical benchmarking protocol: walk-forward cross-validation with base-rate baselines and paired significance tests (McNemar, Diebold-Mariano, BH-FDR) to detect directional forecasting skill. There is no role-for-role correspondence between QFT particle production and a null-hypothesis significance-testing evaluation methodology, so they share no underlying method.
